allow: Bash(PGPASSWORD=masterkey psql -U postgres -h localhost -p 5432 -d tawros -c "\\d app.filiais")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=masterkey psql -U postgres -h localhost -p 5432 -d tawros -c "SELECT * FROM app.filiais LIMIT 10;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=masterkey psql -U postgres -h localhost -p 5432 -d tawros -c "SELECT id, codigo, nome, ativo FROM app.filiais ORDER BY id;")
Bash(cmd.exe /c 'powershell -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -eq 3000 } | Select-Object LocalPort, OwningProcess, State"')
Bash(cmd.exe /c "powershell -Command \\"Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, CPU\\"")
Bash(cmd.exe /c "wmic process where \\"commandline like '%3000%' or name='node.exe'\\" get processid,name,commandline 2>&1")

Bash(cmd.exe /c "psql -U postgres -d tawros -c \\"SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.tawros, u.is_active, EXISTS\(SELECT 1 FROM auth.user_roles ur JOIN auth.roles r ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = u.id AND ur.deleted_at IS NULL AND lower\(r.codigo\) = 'admin'\) as administrador FROM auth.users u WHERE u.email = 'willianbarbosadecamargo@gmail.com';\\" 2>&1")
Bash(psql "postgres://postgres:masterkey@localhost:5432/tawros" -c "SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = 'app' AND table_name = 'log_edicao'")

Bash(psql "postgres://postgres:masterkey@localhost:5432/tawros" -c "SELECT column_name FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'auth' AND table_name = 'user_filiais' AND column_name = 'codigo_filial_cadastro'")
Bash(psql "postgres://postgres:masterkey@localhost:5432/tawros" -c "SELECT id, nome, codigo FROM app.licencas_modulos WHERE lower\(nome\) LIKE '%mudas%' OR lower\(codigo\) LIKE '%mudas%'")
Bash(psql "host=localhost port=5432 dbname=tawros user=postgres password=masterkey" -c "SELECT schemaname, tablename FROM pg_tables WHERE tablename ILIKE '%instruc%' ORDER BY tablename;")

Bash(psql "host=localhost port=5432 dbname=tawros user=postgres password=masterkey" -c "SELECT 'instrucoes' t, count\(*\) FROM app.instrucoes UNION ALL SELECT 'instrucoes_agendamentos', count\(*\) FROM app.instrucoes_agendamentos UNION ALL SELECT 'instrucoes_transportes', count\(*\) FROM app.instrucoes_transportes UNION ALL SELECT 'instrucoes_blocos', count\(*\) FROM app.instrucoes_blocos UNION ALL SELECT 'instrucoes_fardos', count\(*\) FROM app.instrucoes_fardos;")

Bash(psql "host=localhost port=5432 dbname=tawros user=postgres password=masterkey" -c "SELECT EXISTS \(SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema='migrations' OR table_name='migrations' OR table_name='schema_migrations'\) as has_migration_table;")

Bash(psql "host=localhost port=5432 dbname=tawros user=postgres password=masterkey" -t -A -c "SELECT modulo, quantidade_licencas, ativo FROM app.licencas_modulos WHERE deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY modulo;")

PowerShell($env:PGPASSWORD = "masterkey"; psql -U postgres -d tawros -c "SET search_path = app; DELETE FROM instrucoes_agendamentos; DELETE FROM instrucoes_transportes; DELETE FROM instrucoes_blocos CASCADE; DELETE FROM instrucoes_fardos; DELETE FROM instrucoes;" 2>&1)
PowerShell($env:PGPASSWORD = "masterkey"; psql -U postgres -d tawros -c "SELECT id, vagas_disponiveis, vagas_ocupadas FROM app.agenda_disponibilidade;" 2>&1)
PowerShell($env:PGPASSWORD = "masterkey"; psql -U postgres -d tawros -c "SELECT id, vagas_total, vagas_ocupadas FROM app.agenda_disponibilidade WHERE deleted_at IS NULL;" 2>&1)
PowerShell($env:PGPASSWORD = "masterkey"; psql -U postgres -d tawros -c "SELECT id, tipo_produto, status FROM app.instrucoes WHERE deleted_at IS NULL;" 2>&1)
PowerShell($env:PGPASSWORD = "masterkey"; psql -U postgres -d tawros -c "SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name LIKE '%migration%';" 2>&1)

PowerShell($env:PGPASSWORD = "masterkey"; pg_dump -U postgres -d tawros -F c -f "C:\\Users\\desen\\OneDrive\\Documentos\\Projeto\\backups\\tawros_$\(Get-Date -Format 'yyyyMMdd_HHmmss'\).dump" 2>&1; Write-Host "Exit: $LASTEXITCODE")
